---
title: "ECON 444 Consulting Project"
author: "Kendall Landwehr & Tatum Barkat"
format: html
---

```{r}
#Reading in data 

install.packages("readxl")

library(readxl)
consum_data <- read_excel("data/ConsumptionConsumerCategoryHour.xlsx")

price_da_data <- read_excel("data/ActualDayAheadPrices.xlsx")

```
